# fleet module constants
AUDIT_ERROR = 'ERROR'
AUDIT_OK = 'OK'
AUDIT_TIMEOUT = 'TIMEOUT'
STATUS_ENABLED = 'ENABLED'
STATUS_NOT_ENABLED = 'NOT_ENABLED'
STATUS_STALE = 'STALE'

# fleet public function / class signatures
AuditResult(status: 'str', env_score: 'float | None' = None, phase: 'str | None' = None, growth_level: 'int | None' = None, latest_audit: 'datetime | None' = None, message: 'str' = '', issues_summary: "'IssuesSummary | None'" = None) -> None
FleetRow(pj_name: 'str', status: 'str', env_score: 'float | None' = None, growth_level: 'int | None' = None, phase: 'str | None' = None, latest_audit: 'datetime | None' = None, audit_status: 'str' = 'OK', message: 'str' = '', issues_summary: 'IssuesSummary | None' = None, subagents_30d: 'int' = 0, tokens_30d: 'int | None' = None, cache_hit_pct: 'float | None' = None) -> None
IssuesSummary(line_violations: 'int' = 0, hardcoded_values: 'int' = 0, potential_duplicates: 'int' = 0, corrections_unprocessed: 'int' = 0, skill_quality_degraded_count: 'int' = 0) -> None
aggregate_subagents_by_project(subagents_path: 'Path | None' = None, *, window_days: 'int' = 30, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'dict[str, int]'
classify_project(pj_path: 'Path', settings_path: 'Path | None' = None, auto_memory_root: 'Path | None' = None, stale_days: 'int' = 30, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'str'
collect_fleet_status(root: 'Path | None' = None, settings_path: 'Path | None' = None, auto_memory_root: 'Path | None' = None, data_dir: 'Path | None' = None, timeout: 'float' = 10.0, max_workers: 'int' = 2, projects: 'list[Path] | None' = None) -> 'list[FleetRow]'
enumerate_projects(root: 'Path') -> 'list[Path]'
format_status_table(rows: 'list[FleetRow]', now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'str'
main(argv: 'list[str] | None' = None) -> 'int'
resolve_auto_memory_dir(pj_path: 'Path') -> 'Path'
run_audit_subprocess(pj_path: 'Path', timeout: 'float' = 10.0, data_dir: 'Path | None' = None, rl_audit_bin: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'AuditResult'
write_fleet_run(rows: 'list[FleetRow]', fleet_runs_dir: 'Path | None' = None, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'Path'
